forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KWMRYGMXC08VX2W7P2DK2X0W
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8480'
+title: 'Test fixtures: mock MCP.Client + scriptable in-process echo server'
+---
+## What
+Create shared test support in `Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/Support/`: (1) `MockClient.swift` — a mock/recording MCP client that captures `callTool(name:arguments:)` invocations and returns scripted results (success, isError, structuredContent, each content type); (2) `ScriptedServer.swift` — a tiny in-process (or spawned stdio subprocess) MCP echo server usable by adapter/server/E2E tests, scriptable to: paginate `tools/list` across N pages (`nextCursor`), emit `tools/list_changed`, add/remove/re-schema tools, and fail/drop the transport on command.
+
+- [ ] MockClient records calls + returns scripted results
+- [ ] ScriptedServer: echo tool + paginated tools/list
+- [ ] ScriptedServer: list_changed emission + tool add/remove/re-schema
+- [ ] ScriptedServer: induced transport failure
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] Fixtures compile in the test target only (never shipped in the library)
+- [ ] Fixture self-tests prove recording, pagination scripting, and list_changed emission work
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/Support/FixtureSelfTests.swift`: mock records exact name/args; scripted server lists paginated tools and emits list_changed on command
+- [ ] `swift test --filter FixtureSelf` green
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -3,23 +3,22 @@
 - 01KWMRYGMXC08VX2W7P2DK2X0W
 position_column: todo
 position_ordinal: '8480'
-title: 'Test fixtures: mock MCP.Client + scriptable in-process echo server'
+title: 'Test fixture: MockClient conforming to the library''s client seam'
 ---
 ## What
-Create shared test support in `Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/Support/`: (1) `MockClient.swift` — a mock/recording MCP client that captures `callTool(name:arguments:)` invocations and returns scripted results (success, isError, structuredContent, each content type); (2) `ScriptedServer.swift` — a tiny in-process (or spawned stdio subprocess) MCP echo server usable by adapter/server/E2E tests, scriptable to: paginate `tools/list` across N pages (`nextCursor`), emit `tools/list_changed`, add/remove/re-schema tools, and fail/drop the transport on command.
+Create `Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/Support/MockClient.swift`: a mock/recording implementation of the **library's client seam protocol** (defined by the MCPTool adapter task — the swift-sdk's `MCP.Client` is a concrete actor and cannot be substituted directly). MockClient records `callTool(name:arguments:)` invocations exactly and returns scripted results: success, `isError`, `structuredContent`, and each content type (`.text`/`.image`/`.audio`/`.resource`/`.resourceLink`). Test-target only. (The scriptable server lives in its own utility-target task.)

-- [ ] MockClient records calls + returns scripted results
-- [ ] ScriptedServer: echo tool + paginated tools/list
-- [ ] ScriptedServer: list_changed emission + tool add/remove/re-schema
-- [ ] ScriptedServer: induced transport failure
+- [ ] MockClient conforms to the client seam protocol
+- [ ] Records name + arguments byte-for-byte
+- [ ] Scripted results for success/error/structured/every content case

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Fixtures compile in the test target only (never shipped in the library)
-- [ ] Fixture self-tests prove recording, pagination scripting, and list_changed emission work
+- [ ] Compiles in the test target only (never shipped in the library)
+- [ ] Self-test proves exact recording and scripted-result playback

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/Support/FixtureSelfTests.swift`: mock records exact name/args; scripted server lists paginated tools and emits list_changed on command
-- [ ] `swift test --filter FixtureSelf` green
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/Support/MockClientSelfTests.swift`: recording fidelity + playback of each scripted result kind
+- [ ] `swift test --filter MockClientSelf` green

 ## Workflow
 - Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file
